text_preview:
## First case: May 23, 1986. Time: 20:10. Duration: 20 minutes.

Two people in Brasília, Distrito Federal, observed an unidentified flying object in a round shape, “luminous, brighter than the stars, changing color” that remained stationary while it was observed. According to the witnesses, the UFO was towards the west, and emitted, predominantly, sparkling orange and blue colors. The reporting witness was unable to estimate the altitude or distance from the UFO. According to information in the report, “nothing was observed on the radars, dispensing the recording.” The sighting was done with t
summary: Multiple UFO sightings across DF, RJ, SP on May 23, 1986; military and civilian witnesses reported luminous objects; radars showed nothing.
